bot.js: *   - Tracks card reveals, assassin hits, and game end
bot.js:    '#8C8D8D': 'assassin',
bot.js:// Pending game-end check ΓÇö when assassin reveal coincides with full-board flip,
bot.js:let pendingGameEndCheck = null;  // { timestamp, suspectedAssassin: word|null }
bot.js:      //   --CardColor: var(--black-cardBg)   ΓåÆ REVEALED assassin
bot.js:      // color resolves to red / blue / assassin. Mid-flip animation briefly
bot.js:        else if (colorName === 'black' || colorName === 'assassin') cardColor = 'assassin';
bot.js:        // Only red/blue/assassin are knowable reveals. Face-down AND
bot.js:        const isRevealed = (cardColor === 'red' || cardColor === 'blue' || cardColor === 'assassin');
bot.js:  // Only red/blue/assassin are knowable; neutrals stay hidden to a spectator.
bot.js:  const revealedColors = { red: 0, blue: 0, assassin: 0 };
bot.js:  const coloredRevealTotal = revealedColors.red + revealedColors.blue + revealedColors.assassin;
bot.js:  const assassinHit = revealedColors.assassin > 0;
bot.js:  } else if (assassinHit) {
bot.js:    // The guessing team hit the assassin and loses; the other team wins.
bot.js:    reason = 'assassin';
bot.js:    if (assassinHit) {
bot.js:      const hit = Object.entries(state.cards).find(([w, d]) => d.color === 'assassin' && d.revealed);
bot.js:      const hitWord = hit ? hit[0] : '(assassin)';
bot.js:      log(`≡ƒÆÇ ASSASSIN HIT: ${hitWord} ΓÇö ${loser.toUpperCase()} loses!`);
bot.js:      await onAssassin(hitWord, loser, state.players);
bot.js:async function onAssassin(word, losingTeam, players) {
bot.js:  // Stat crediting (assassinHits + win/loss) happens in the v7 overlay via botApplyAssassin().
bot.js:  broadcast({ type: 'assassin', word, losingTeam });
bot.js:  const revealed = { blue: 0, red: 0, assassin: 0 };
bot.js:  const assassinLeft = revealed.assassin > 0 ? 0 : 1;
bot.js:  // Neutrals remaining = unrevealed slots minus the face-down colored/assassin cards.
bot.js:  // and we know exactly how many of those are actually team/assassin cards.
bot.js:  const neutralLeft = Math.max(0, unrevealedSlots - blueLeft - redLeft - assassinLeft);
bot.js:      assassin: assassinLeft,
